feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Post tax payable - Vat return Poland - list of invoices included
entry.content:
Dear community,

I would like to ask you if there is a possibility to extract list of all invoices included (e.g. from last fiscal year) in the tax payable postings. Currently for vat return we use app run statutory reports but when you move to the step for report creation and you press new run you are redirected to the old GUI app - Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax and tax payable is posted via batch session:

The posting is done per profit center and there is no link to related invoices. So do you know if there is any cds or app which stored this kind of information (invoices included in each run/post payable posting).

Thanks,

Kamil

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Archiving Procedure for Handling Units and Batches in SAP S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content: In SAP S/4 Public Cloud I need to proceed with the archiving of handling units and batches. We would need information regarding the Apps to use and all the steps to implement to proceed with the archiving of the indicated objects. Following an initial check, we found that the App to use is Archive Administration but we do not detect it within our system. We tried with the Archive Explorer App but there are no active objects. If this is the App to use, how do you activate the objects?

entry.title: Mass deletion of handling units in SAP S/4 Public Coud
entry.content:
In S/4 Public Cloud we need to proceed with the operation of emptying and massively deleting the handling units. We are using the App Create and process unassigned handling units (HU02) but within it it is not possible to select a large number of HU. Since the HU to be emptied and deleted are 50,000, is there a way or an App that allows us to proceed more quickly with the operation? 

We also tried to copy and paste from csv files. but in the App it is possible to paste a few lines at a time

entry.title: Can we retrieve the Level 1 processor details for a Purchase Order Workflow in S4 HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are using the CDS View: I_WorkflowStatusOverview to retrieve the Purchase Order Workflow details but are not able to find the level 1 approver. We do get all the approver list but we need to display only Level 1 processor details. 

Let us know the CDS view/Field name for the same. 

Refer to the below screenshot: 

Thanks and Regards,

Shweta Sharma

entry.title: 从外围系统OA怎么更新ES销售订单行项目
entry.content:
场景：销售订单在OA审批不通过，审批结果传SAP，需修改销售订单抬头状态和订单行拒绝原因。
方法：调用两个接口分别修改销售订单抬头和订单行；销售订单如果有10行，需要调用销售订单行接口10次。这种方式十分不友好，有没有其它方法？

entry.title: EPIC集成银行CBS系统的落地方案
entry.content: SAP HANA 公有云版本2502中，是否能通过BTP平台 CPI组件 让SAP 的EPIC功能与中国的CBS银行系统集成， 如果可行，希望能获取具体的实施方案。

entry.title: Intermittent Issue Starting HANA DB Instance: Provision/Update Operation Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are facing an intermittent issue while attempting to start our HANA DB instance. The error message displayed is:

Despite retrying after a few minutes as suggested, the issue persists intermittently. Has anyone encountered this issue before? If so, what steps can be taken to resolve it?

entry.title: Missing Intermediary Agent Node (</IntrmyAgt1>) for few transactions in Bank Chain Setup
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have a requirement to use an intermediary bank for intercompany supplier transactions in both USD and EUR. To meet this requirement, we created two intermediary banks in the Manage Bank Chains app—one for USD and one for EUR—with identical details except for the currency.

These intermediary bank details have been assigned to the supplier master data. However, during testing, we observed that the intermediary agent node appears correctly for few transactions, but not for all USD and EUR transactions—the node itself is missing.

Could you please advise if there is any configuration step we might have missed in the setup? Test Case Screenshot are attached for reference.

 

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dears,

As it is in subject - How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud ?

For purpose:

Persons on B2B contract - they can't see each other's invoices in Supplier Invoice List app. 

Both person will be in the same Company Code, in the same Purchasing Group. Only difference will be in Cost Center.

How can we avoid this kind of situations ? 

Which attribute can limit this?

Regards

entry.title: SAP CAP Hana Cloud Table access over synonym not working
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We have a CAP service that needs to access a Hana Cloud DB over synonyms.

The DB table looks as follows:

Our cds data model:

namespace reverse.logix;

@cds.persistence.exists 
entity Addresses {
  key ShippingPoint : String(4);
  AddressID  : String(10);
}

Our synonym file:

{
  "REVERSE_LOGIX_ADDRESSES": {
    "target": {
        "schema": "SBX",        
        "object": "2VS_YY1_SHIPPT_ADDR"
    }
  }
}

Because the DB Table columns are in CamelCase, we have added the property cdsc in the package.json file (otherwise we were getting an error that the column was not recognized).

  "cds": {
    "cdsc": {  "sqlMapping": "quoted"  },
    "requires": {
      "auth": "xsuaa"
    },
    "sql": {
      "native_hana_associations": false
    }
  }

But we are getting the error as follows:

Error: "src/gen/ReverseLogixService.ShipmentAddresses.hdbview": the file requires "db://reverse.logix.Addresses" which is not provided by any file [8212001] (STDERR, APP/TASK/deploy)#

 Any idea about how can be wrong?

Thanks!

C.

entry.title: Missing tab in SOAMANAGER
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We're currently activating our Inbound for EDI, and while we run the SOAMANAGER, we didn't see the "Application and Scenario Communcation Tab". 

Is there any updates or changes for this tab name in SOAMANAGER? or is there a guide to add this tab via authorization in SU01 to be visible this in SOAMANAGER?

BTW, currently we're using S4 HANA Private Cloud Edition 2020.

Thank you in advance!
-Jaspher

entry.title: Change a GL account assigned to this activity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Does anybody know how can I solve the following problem?

In the test system we were running some tests and we have created new activity type T036 and we didn’t change a GL account assigned to this activity.  We have created a project, assigned an employee and input some hours.  These hours weren’t posted because a GL account was blocked. 

We changed a GL account in Manage Activity type APP for a right one. 

 

We have created new rates in the APP manage cost rates services

 

But Input the time again in the same project, we have the same error that GL account is blocked.

 

 

When I check the app where -used list activity Types, I can see that this activity type participates in Sending Cost centers in Cost rate Maintenance

 

And when I navigate inside I can see that I have 4 rates and only one with GL account I needed 6290000012

 

 

But in APP manage cost rates services

I have only 2 rates maintained:

 

 

¿Does anybody know how to solve this problem?

 

Thank you

entry.title: 从哪个CDS VIEW读取交货单的最后修改时间(时分秒)
entry.content: 从哪个CDS VIEW读取交货单的最后修改时间(时分秒)

entry.title: Output tables in Kmeans
entry.content:
Hi, I have a P-user and I'm working with the free version of HANA Cloud
The area of focus is clustering with K-means.
Following the documentation, I created the input and output tables.
I then call the function:

CALL _SYS_AFL.PAL_KMEANS

The result is the following error: Could not execute 'CALL _SYS_AFL.PAL_KMEANS(
DATA_INPUT_ENCODED_CLIENTI_ENERGIA,
PARAMETERS, ...'
Error: (dberror) [2048]: column store error: search table error: [2620] executor: plan operation failed;Can not insert data from temp table "H00::DEV-BA-PAL:P3_EECB960D20BCAA4CA32A5090F32BAE6A (t -1)" into table ""DEV-BA-PAL"."OUTPUT_RESULT_ASSIGNMENTS"".

Is there any limitation of the use of K-means in the free version of HANA Cloud?

 

I appreciate your support

Francesco

entry.title: 国内跨公司销售POD不生效
entry.content:
同一个公司下的销售组织和工厂，POD使用正常； 国内的跨公司销售（工厂和销售组织属于不同公司），POD不能使用；销售订单带出的移动类型为601，带不出687 。如下图：

 

IMG中“设置现货销售与 VSiT 流程的相关性”不允许配置工厂和销售组织属于不同公司的配置；如下图

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Analytical Model Performance Trace & PlanViz
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to analyze the Performance of an Analytical Model in SAP Datasphere to identify possible design issues. Therefore I follow the SAP Help documentation to extract the MDS Statement and generate the PlanViz File.

But I currently have the following problem:

  1. I execute the Model in SAC and retreive the MDS statement. Here I have a runtime of about ~40 seconds.
  2. Then I call generate the MDS statement with the CALL SYS.EXECUTE_MDS(...) statement. Here I have the behaviour that this is then generated in around ~1 second and the PlanViz is not reflecting the ~40 seconds runtime in the frontend.

My current assumption is that this is due to the MDS cache. But in the Database Console also cannot flush it, due to missing authorization. 

Does anybody has had similar issues or knows any best practices to generate a correct PlanViz out of an Analytical Model MDS statement?

Thank you for your input!

Regards

Christian

entry.title: Billing Document and Eway Bill Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In s/4 hana public cloud client need to see the preview of both billing document and eway bill output forms in billing document screen.

I tried in different ways but didnt find a solution.

Here in second line how can i add my billing document template. Please help.

Thanks

Sarat.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Access Controls cannot get transported: Object Type DRAS not permitted
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have created an access control (define accesspolicy) on SAP S/4 Public Cloud. It works perfectly but I am not able to release the the task to which the access control belongs.

I get the following error: "Object DRAS ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER is not permitted. Object type DRAS cannot be transported."

ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER looks like this:

define accesspolicy ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER {
    @EndUserText.label: 'Business Partner of User'
    define aspect ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER as
        select from ZI_BusinessUser with user element UserID
            {
                BusinessPartner //bypass when = 'bypass_value'
            }
            
}

This way I am able to define a role which checks for the business partner number of the logged on user:

@MappingRole: true
define role ZSOMEROLE {
    grant
        select
            on
                ZSOMECDSVIEW
                    where
                     CratedBy = $session.user or
                     (_SomeAssociation.BusinessPartnerId ) = aspect ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER 
                     ;
}

 

Any help is very appreciated. I guess I will need to raise a SAP incident for this.

Thank you
Daniel

entry.title: Issue with Step 6 - Knowledge Check in SAP HANA Cloud Mission Trial
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

I’m completing the tutorial “Connect as the new user” and the knowledge check in Step 6 is not accepting any answer. I have tried all the following SQL commands (with and without semicolons, with correct formatting, etc.):
• CONNECT report PASSWORD <Your_Password>;
• CONNECT USER report PASSWORD <Your_Password>
• CONNECT "report" IDENTIFIED BY "password"
• Even the exact literal: CONNECT report PASSWORD password

None of these are accepted, even though they match both the SQL standard and the tutorial instructions.

Can you please check if there is a bug in the answer validation or provide the expected exact string?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Custom action button in S/4HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I’m working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud fiori application and I have a requirement to add a custom action button to a standard Fiori application. As we know, direct modification of standard apps is restricted in the public cloud.
Can anyone guide me on the possible extensibility options to achieve this?
Is there any supported way to add a custom button using Developer Extensibility or any?
If not directly possible, is there any standard app developed using RAP BO (Restful ABAP Programming Model) that supports custom action extensions?
Ideally, I want to add some custom button and logic behind that button . Thank you.
